text: yhwda': riga' dyshw' mshyḥa': w'aḥwna' dya'qwb: l'any dyna' qeryi': mwḥebi' b'alaha' baba': wnṭyri' byshw' mshyḥa':
raḥmi' wshlama' bḥwba' zayed lawkwn.

mwḥebi': kad klah ḥamḥwarwta' be'bada' ywen hwa' lektaba' 'elawkwn 'al ḥayi' dyen dgawa': peshly mwlyeṣa' lektaba' 'elawkwn: kad parpwli' ywen d'agwna' 'abdytwn bḥatir dhaymanwta': hy dhar ḥda' gaha' peshla' swpyta' lqadyshi'.

sabab d'werwn bṭeshwa' 'nashi': 'any dmn qadymy peshlwn ktybi' l'aha' gwnahkarwta': 'nashi' kapwri': dlshapaqatih d'alahan madwri' yna' lpaḥzwta': wlhw dyli' bnapshih 'agayan wmaran: yshw' mshyḥa': ki' sarby.
'yna' lmadkartawkwn beba'ya' ywen: kad ḥda' gaha' yde'lawkwn kl mendy: dmarya' kad lṭayepa' mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn pwreqli': hy dtartiy l'any dla' hwmenwn twleqli'.
wlmala'ki': 'any dla' nṭerwn rishanwtay: 'ela' shbeqlwn 'mara' dyay: nṭyrayli' ldywan dywma' gwra' byeswri' dl'alam tḥwt ḥwbya'.
da'ky dsdwm w'amwra' wmdynati' dḥaderwanay: kad har bdmwta' d'ani' znilwn: w'zelwn batr besra' 'ḥirna': mwtbi' yna' lṭwpsa': kad qably dywan dnwra' dhal 'alam.
har b'aha' tahar 'wp 'ani' ḥalmani' lbesra' ki' kapleny: wlmarwta' ki' masly: wlḥeqri' ki' gadpy.
'yna' myka'iyl risha' dmala'ki': hw d'am 'akilqarṣa' kad maqrwṣi' bedrasha' hwa' 'al pagrih dmwshi': la' qwshderi' dmaytyi' hwa' 'alwhy dywan dgwdapa': 'ela' 'meri': nagew bywk marya'.
w'ani' b'any dli' yna' byda'ya' ki' gadpy: wba'ny dkyana'yt 'ayk ḥaywata' ḥarshi' balad yna': b'ani' ki' maḥreby ganay.
way 'elay: db'wrḥih dqa'iyn 'zelwn: wbatr ḥelṭwnywtih dbel'am bhaqa' rwpilwn ganatay: wb'aṣywtih dqwrḥ tleqlwn.

'ani' yna' mwmi' gaw meshtwyatawkwn dḥwba': 'yman d'abdy meshtwta' 'amawkwn: mar'yani' dganay bi' zd'wta': 'nani' dla' meṭra' dmn pawḥi' lwbli': 'ylani' dtshiry bi' mahṣwl: tartiy gahi' myti': wplyṭi' mn 'eqray:
lapi' ḥaylani' dyama': dbyed gebwntay ki' maḥzy nḥeptay: kawkbi' ḥalṭani': 'ani' dmysh dḥwbya' dl'alam 'elay nṭyrta' yla'.
wnwbili' 'wp 'al 'ani': hw dyli' dshab'a' mn 'adam: ḥnwk: kad 'amer: ha': 'tili' marya' bribwati' dqadyshwhy:
d'abed dywan 'al klay: wmankes lklay kapwri' sabab dklay pwlḥanay dkapwrwta' dbkpwrya' 'bedlwn: wsabab dklay himezmani' qeshyi' dhwmzemlwn 'alwhy ḥaṭayi' kapwri'.
'ani' yna' dki' ṭarṭemy: wki' qably: kad 'ayk shahwatyatay ki' ḥadry: wpwmay ki' hamzem himezmani' rami': wki' ḥaqry lpata' d'nasha' bḥater dzawdwnywyati'.
'yna' 'aḥtwn: mwḥeby: dkwrwn lhimezmani' 'any dqadmayta' peshlwn 'myri' mn shlyḥi' dmaran yshw' mshyḥa':
da'ky d'amry hwaw lawkwn: dbḥarta' dzabni' bet hawy masḥerani': d'azly batr shahwatyatay dkpwrya'.
'ani' yna' 'any dbeprasha' yna': napshanayi': drwḥa' layt byay.
'yna' 'aḥtwn: mwḥeby: bhaymanwtawkwn qadyshta' banytwn ganawkwn: ṣalwyi' brwḥa' dqwdsha':
ganawkwn bḥwbih d'alaha' naṭrytwn: kad saprytwn lkaramih dmaran yshw' mshyḥa' lḥayi' dla'bad.
wlḥakma' menay 'bwdwn karam: kad maqrwṣi':
wlḥakma' bzdw'ta' parqwn: kad ganwytwn lhwn mn nwra': kad sanytwn 'wp lṣwdra' dmn besra' lwkenta' yla'.
'adya' lhw dmaṣi' naṭerawkwn dla' graṭta': wmaqem lawkwn qadm pata' dḥeqrih dla' lawma' bpṣaḥta':
bnapshih 'alaha' parwqan: byed yshw' maran: ḥeqra': wgwrwta': whwkma': wḥayla': mqadm 'almi': 'wp 'adya': wlklay 'almi': 'amiyn.
